title: Export to CSV in Excel, with group, item and subitem column details on a single row
excerpt:
Description
Ability to export to an unformatted csv sheet where all columns for a subitem are included, as well as its parent properties available on a single row.

posts.author: eredfearn (Emily Redfearn)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

Ability to export to an unformatted csv sheet where all columns for a subitem are included, as well as its parent properties available on a single row.

What are you trying to achieve

Better ability to analyse data in excel in table formats to populate graphs outside of Monday.com.

posts.author: Iryna_Belaya (Iryna Belaya)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello Emily,

If you’re open to apps, drop in here a solution that gives a better export view: Smart Spreadsheet for monday.com.

Once you import a board into it, you can export data for both items and subitems. The latter includes the Owner item and Owner Group columns, so the exported file will look exactly the same as you see it on the board:

image1649×548 86.5 KB

These are the formats available for export:

image1672×921 112 KB
